title: Remote Data Entry Operators Needed -- 2
desc:
I manage several ongoing projects that require accurate, high-volume data entry. Most of the work is performed in Microsoft Excel, with the occasional task in Google Sheets or a web-based form. Your primary responsibility will be to transfer information exactly as provided, run quick checks for consistency, and keep each file clean and well-organised before the deadline hits.  

A solid eye for detail matters more than fancy qualifications, but a knack for data verification will definitely make you stand out. If you can spot a misplaced digit or a stray extra space without being asked, you are already ahead of the pack. Stable internet, reliable communication, and the ability to meet agreed turnaround times are non-negotiable.  

When you reply, please let me know:  
• A brief outline of your previous data-entry experience (projects, tools, industries—whatever shows me you’ve done this before).  
• Your current typing speed in WPM, if you have it.  
• How many hours per day you can realistically commit.  
• Your preferred rate, either hourly or per project.  

This is freelance, fully remote work with room for a long-term arrangement if we mesh well. Only apply if you’re confident you can keep accuracy high and deadlines intact; I’m after operators I can trust with sensitive data and repeat assignments.

title: Crypto Founder Pipeline Partner START NOW
desc: We have a high‑value service for crypto projects that’s already packaged, priced, and proven. What I need now is a partner who can walk warm crypto contacts straight to the finish line. If your day‑to‑day already involves talking with crypto founders, you’re exactly who I’m looking for. Here’s the flow: → You introduce a founder from your existing network → You guide them through the short script + deck I provide → You secure the signature → You make sure the fee lands The moment the founder pays, your commission fires — generous, uncapped, and sent immediately. No cold outreach. No grinding. No funnels. No hand‑holding. This role ONLY works for someone who already lives inside crypto deal flow. Founders are the priority. If you also speak with token teams, exchanges, or web3 agencies, that’s a bonus. **Looking for a same day close**
